岗位描述: LATIN AMERICA We are the leading family entertainment company in Latin America and have been present in the region since the 1940s when Walt Disney himself first traveled to the area to create the company’s sixth animated film “Saludos Amigos.” Today, the business is expansive with offices in Argentina, Brazil, Mexico and the U.S. (Miami) – all working together to enrich people’s lives through storytelling and experiences.
Job中文描述: 拉丁美洲 我们是拉丁美洲领先的家庭娱乐公司，自1940年代沃尔特·迪士尼本人首次前往该地区创作公司第六部动画电影《致候吾友》以来，一直扎根于此。如今，业务规模庞大，在阿根廷、巴西、墨西哥和美国（迈阿密）设有办事处——所有团队共同努力，通过叙事和体验丰富人们的生活。
